Petition: 1)850 Claim 2)Request For Accounting 3)Breach Of Trust 4)Removal Of Trustee 5)Elder Abuse
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Continued To Jun-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction
Off Calendar May-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Usoz for Edna Moreno.

Mr. Usoz stated that he did not timely notify the Court of his intent to contest the Court's tentative ruling and that he was informed by his staff that a tentative ruling had not been entered. The Court stated that a tentative ruling was entered, that it had received the copies of the late oppositions filed this morning, that they were due nine days prior to the hearing, and that pursuant to Rule of Court 3.1300(d) that it was disregarding the late filings. The tentative ruling is adopted. Moving party is to submit the order.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported.
